title: Duplicate Charge Dispute
user_message: Hi, I was charged twice for my subscription this month. I see two $29.99 charges on my credit card statement from your company on March 1st. I need this fixed immediately.

title: Locked Account Recovery
user_message: I can't log into my account. I tried resetting my password three times but I never get the reset email. My account has all my project files and I need access urgently.

title: Impossible Same-Day Deletion Request
user_message: I need you to permanently delete my account and all my data right now and also refund every payment I've ever made going back two years. Can you do that in this chat?
